title: Clockwork Modpack
description: A Modpack players can explore fantasy seamlessly with steampunk machinery.
body:
The Clockwork SMP modpack is crafted to deliver an immersive blend of fantasy powers and steampunk machinery through a unique combination of Origins and Create as its centerpiece mods. Origins offers players a choice of diverse powers and traits, each adding unique advantages and challenges to gameplay. Meanwhile, Create provides the tools to build anything from simple machines to elaborate, fully-automated contraptions, capturing the spirit of steampunk-inspired innovation.

While Origins and Create are the stars of the show, Clockwork SMP also includes additional, thoughtfully selected mods that enrich the gameplay experience without overwhelming it. These additions enhance and support the main features, offering a balanced experience while leaving room for you to shape the world to your preferences.

Clockwork SMP is designed with flexibility and replayability in mind, letting you tailor your gameplay to suit any playstyle, from roleplaying and survival challenges to engineering and automation. Join the Clockwork SMP world and experience the synergy of magic and machinery in Minecraft like never before!
